instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A denial of service vulnerabiity exists in fig2dev through 3.28a due to a segfault in the open_stream function in readpics.c.
output: A denial of service (DoS) vulnerability has been identified in fig2dev up to version 3.28a. This vulnerability is caused by a segmentation fault occurring within the open_stream function located in the readpics.c file.
